what: Call the Anthropic LLM API with vault context and user prompt to generate 1-3 knowledge entry proposals
why: Use AI to produce structured, ready-to-review knowledge proposals (title, category, tags, description, content) that match the vault's existing style and fill the user's requested knowledge gap

output.console: Array of 1-3 KnowledgeProposal objects parsed from LLM response

success_handling.criteria: LLM returns a valid JSON array with 1-3 proposals, each containing required fields (title, category, tags, description, required_knowledge, rules, content), and the array is successfully parsed and normalized

error_handling.criteria: resolveAuth returns type 'none' — no Anthropic API key is available in environment or config
error_handling.action: Return NO_AUTH error informing the user to configure an API key

error_handling.scenario: LLM returns invalid or empty response
error_handling.criteria: Response text does not contain a valid JSON array, or the parsed array is empty
error_handling.action: Return INVALID_LLM_RESPONSE error — the model did not follow the expected output format

event.message: LLM returned empty or non-array response

error_handling.criteria: Network error, rate limit, timeout, or other exception during the Anthropic API call
error_handling.action: Return LLM_ERROR with the underlying error message

decisions.outcome: Return normalized proposals — AI generation flow is complete

decisions.condition: LLM response is unparseable or empty

decisions.outcome: Abort generation, return LLM_ERROR with details
